assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Kubernetes 1.32 requires Istio 1.20.0+' and includes compatibility requirements section

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Check Istio-Kubernetes compatibility matrix' in pre-upgrade section and references Istio supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'If you're on Istio 1.19.x or older, upgrade Istio BEFORE starting GKE upgrade' and includes Phase 2 for Istio control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: While response mentions sidecar injection and node drain issues, it doesn't specifically explain the mutating webhook mechanism or how webhooks cause issues during drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Restart workloads to get updated sidecars' and 'Verify sidecar versions match control plane' with specific verification commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring proxy-status during upgrades and verification commands to check proxy versions match control plane

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check sidecar versions and proxy sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Sidecar Version Skew' risk section warning that 'Mismatched sidecar/control plane versions cause connection failures'
